messages.text: saw that peace sign and remembered last night in my sleep
swear you were on a treadmill racing god and winning
yea you were just standing there in my dream too
you got jokes, now show it
you told dream me my incline was weak and so was my game
and you still texted me huh
let me risk it tuesday night gym then tacos after
bold assuming i eat with strangers
